texto: Rapunzel took a ragged breath and called back, “What are you?”“Pardon?”“What are you,” she asked again, frustration mingling with her fear, “What sort of beast are you? Are you a wolf?”“Does a wolf walk on two legs? I am a man.”There was a pause before Rapunzel called again, “Are you a manwolf?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Zoe Lore que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “Rapunzel took a ragged breath and called back, “What are you?”“Pardon?”“What are you,” she asked …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, bdsm, rapunzel, com foco em reflexao.
